_notes: Hand-curated by reading both differentials in full. Source (tk-soft) has 2 root constraints, 3 custom extensions (conditionDuration, conditionSeverityScore, diagnosisGroup), and category slices for problemList and encounterDiagnosis. Target (hemas) replaces all extensions with hospital-specific ones (hospitalDepartment, icdBlock, chronicity), replaces category slices with admissionDiagnosis and dischargeDiagnosis, changes code binding to hemas VS, adds code.coding slicing with mandatory icd10 [1..1] and optional snomed slices, adds code.text, makes encounter mandatory (min=1), changes all reference targets to hemas profiles, narrows onset[x] and abatement[x] by removing Age type, adds stage/stage.summary, and widens recorder reference. clinicalStatus, verificationStatus, severity, bodySite, recordedDate, note are identical.

drifts.description: Root constraints removed in target: [tk-con-1 (error: Condition must have either a code or a category), tk-con-2 (warning: Resolved conditions should have an abatement date)]. These constraints no longer apply in target profile.
New constraint 'hemas-con-1' added in target (severity: error): 'Condition must have a code with at least one coding' â€” expression: code.coding.exists(). Not present in source profile.

New constraint 'hemas-con-2' added in target (severity: warning): 'Confirmed conditions should have an onset' â€” expression: verificationStatus.coding.where(code='confirmed').exists() implies onset.exists(). Not present in source profile.
Extension slice 'conditionDuration' (0..1, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile. Was defined in source for capturing condition duration details.
Extension slice 'conditionSeverityScore' (0..1, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile. Was defined in source for a numerical severity score.
Extension slice 'diagnosisGroup' (0..1, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile. Was defined in source for grouping diagnoses.
New extension slice 'hospitalDepartment' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Hospital-specific extension for the originating department. Not present in source profile.
New extension slice 'icdBlock' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Hospital-specific extension for ICD classification block. Not present in source profile.
New extension slice 'chronicity' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Hospital-specific extension for acute/chronic classification. Not present in source profile.
Slice 'problemList' (0..1, MustSupport=true, patternCodeableConcept=problem-list-item from condition-category) removed in target profile.
Slice 'encounterDiagnosis' (0..1, MustSupport=true, patternCodeableConcept=encounter-diagnosis from condition-category) removed in target profile.

New MustSupport slice 'admissionDiagnosis' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true, patternCodeableConcept=encounter-diagnosis from http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-category). Not present in source profile.

New MustSupport slice 'dischargeDiagnosis' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true, patternCodeableConcept=discharge-diagnosis from https://hemas.example.com/fhir/CodeSystem/condition-category). Not present in source profile.

Binding changed: Source uses extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/condition-code). Target uses extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/condition-code). Same binding strength but different ValueSet â€” target uses hemas-specific condition codes.

Slicing added in target on Condition.code.coding: discriminator type=pattern, path=$this, rules=open. Allows named coding slices for specific terminologies (icd10, snomed). Source had no slicing on code.coding.

New mandatory slice 'icd10' added in target [1..1, MustSupport=true]. Source has Condition.code.coding with min=1 but no named slices. Target introduces a mandatory ICD-10 coding slice â€” every condition code must include an ICD-10 coding.
MustSupport added on mandatory slice 'icd10' [1..1]. New MS=true slice on a now-required coding element.
New MustSupport slice 'snomed' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Optional SNOMED CT coding slice. Not present in source profile.

Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1] and MustSupport removed in target (constraint relaxed: source defines code.coding.system as min=1 mustSupport=true; target (hemas) does not define general code.coding.system constraints, inheriting R4 base min=0 mustSupport=false, instead constraining within named slices icd10/snomed).

Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1] and MustSupport removed in target (constraint relaxed: source defines code.coding.code as min=1 mustSupport=true; target (hemas) does not define general code.coding.code constraints, inheriting R4 base min=0 mustSupport=false, instead constraining within named slices icd10/snomed).
New MustSupport element 'code.text' added in target (min=0, MustSupport=true). Human-readable description of the condition code. Not present in source profile.

Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient]. Target constrains to [https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient].
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Source has no explicit minimum (inherits R4 base min=0). Target makes encounter mandatory â€” all conditions must be linked to a hospital encounter.

Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter]. Target constrains to [https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter].
Type narrowed: Source allows [dateTime, Age, Period]. Target restricts to [dateTime, Period] â€” Age type is removed.
Type narrowed: Source allows [dateTime, Age, Period]. Target restricts to [dateTime, Period] â€” Age type is removed.

Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner]. Target has no explicit type constraint (inherits R4 base: Practitioner|PractitionerRole|Patient|RelatedPerson) â€” reference is widened.
New MustSupport element 'stage' added in target (min=0, MustSupport=true). Supports hospital-specific staging information. Not present in source profile.
New MustSupport element 'stage.summary' added in target (min=0, MustSupport=true). Captures a summary of the condition stage. Not present in source profile.
